memberdef.name: HANDLE_APPROX
memberdef.initializer: case ApproxTopK_mode_t::APPROX_TOPK_BUCKETS_B##NB##_D##BD: \ FAISS_THROW_IF_NOT_FMT( \ k <= NB * BD, \ "The chosen mode (%d) of approximate top-k supports " \ "up to %d values, but %zd is requested.", \ (int)(ApproxTopK_mode_t::APPROX_TOPK_BUCKETS_B##NB##_D##BD), \ NB * BD, \ k); \ HeapWithBucketsForHamming32< \ CMax<hamdis_t, int64_t>, \ NB, \ BD, \ HammingComputer>:: \ addn(j1 - j0, hc, bs2_, k, bh_val_, bh_ids_, sel); \ break;
